questionHtml:
The radius of a circle is measured to be (10.0 ± 0.5) cm. What is the area of the circle?

A.  (314.2 ± 0.3) cm2

B.  (314 ± 1) cm2

C.  (314 ± 15) cm2

D.  (314 ± 31) cm2

meta.title: The radius of a circle is measured to be (10.0 ± 0.5) cm. What is the area of the circle? A. (314.2 ± 0.3) cm2 B. (314 ± 1) cm2 C. (314 ± 15) cm2 D. (314 ± 31) cm2
